capability_matrix: Generic EventDraft, Art.12 reference fields, schema_version, timestamp, actor, subject_ref exist. Missing dedicated decision/policy/checkpoint schemas, tenant/project/run/session taxonomy beyond session_id, correlation/causation/idempotency fields, replay spec, and schema-evolution registry.

SHA-256 hash chain, canonical hash equality, prev_hash/event_hash/seq tamper detection exist. Missing duplicate detection, explicit reorder/missing taxonomy, root/checkpoint, proof bundle, and durable append-only backend.
Library verification and golden vectors exist. Missing verifier CLI, auditor JSON API, external verifier spec, proof bundle, negative/malformed vector registry.
Only narrow EU AI Act Art.12(2)(a) field mapping exists. EU AI Act Art.13-15, DORA Art.8, NIS2, GDPR accountability, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF are missing structured obligation registry and tests.

ADR-0003 exists. No TSAProvider, AnchorRecord, TSA verification, trust roots, key lifecycle, revocation story, offline verification, Rekor substrate anchor, or anchor vectors. Implementation remains M5 blocker for temporal trust claims.
In-memory append-only container and fromEvents rehydration exist. File/SQLite/Postgres/S3, append-only durable log, retention, tenant isolation, encryption, migration, backup/recovery missing.
No AIOS/generic/LangGraph/AgentScope/OpenAI/Claude/Codex/MCP adapters; no typed tool-call/policy-check/human-approval/lease/budget/supervisor event schemas.
Quickstarts exist. No attestplane init/record/verify/export/inspect/map-framework/anchor/doctor, no JSONL IO, no examples directory.
implemented for alpha core; partial product surface

Typed APIs, deterministic serialization, package metadata and tests exist. TS is ESM-only Node >=22; no CJS/browser claim. Python local audit verified 3.12; matrix is CI-dependent. Generated docs and richer error taxonomy missing.

Strong baseline: pinned actions, CodeQL, OSV, SBOM, Scorecard, REUSE, DCO, publish workflows, npm provenance. Branch protection not provable from files; SLSA L3 incomplete; sdist reproducibility known gap.
README.md; pyproject.toml; package.json; GOVERNANCE.md; SECURITY.md; TRADEMARK.md
Alpha and legal-advice disclaimers exist. Risk remains around EU AI Act ready, broad framework coverage, technical guarantee, cryptographically anchored wording, certification language.

missing_modules_matrix.missing_content: No command surface for independent verification
missing_modules_matrix.minimum_deliverable: attestplane verify JSONL/bundle with exit codes

missing_modules_matrix.module: EU AI Act Art.12 obligation mapping

missing_modules_matrix.minimum_deliverable: DORA rows with disclaimers and unsupported marks

missing_modules_matrix.missing_content: No AI Act retention vs GDPR erasure guidance

tickets.title: Add verifier CLI
tickets.rationale: Library-only verification is insufficient for independent auditors.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: CLI verifies JSONL/bundle and returns stable exit codes.
tickets.security_legal_considerations: Technical verification only, no legal compliance claim.

tickets.title: Add proof bundle format
tickets.rationale: Evidence must be portable beyond process memory.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Bundle includes events, chain head, metadata, optional anchors, deterministic hash.
tickets.tests_required: Python/TS round trip and malformed tests.

tickets.title: Add negative conformance vectors
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Shared malformed vectors replay in both SDKs.

tickets.title: Add canonical JSON spec document
tickets.rationale: ADR prose is not an implementer spec.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Standalone spec with examples and rejection cases.

tickets.title: Add EU AI Act Article 12 obligation mapping
tickets.rationale: Current Art.12 wording needs structured support.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Rows include article, obligation_id, fields, event mapping, verifier expectation, status.

tickets.title: Add DORA Article 8 obligation mapping
tickets.acceptance_criteria: DORA rows use same registry; unsupported controls explicit.

tickets.title: Add generic agent runtime adapter interface
tickets.rationale: Substrate needs a stable runtime embedding point.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: RuntimeEventAdapter maps runtime events to EventDraft.
tickets.security_legal_considerations: Do not capture secrets/PII by default.

tickets.title: Add AIOS adapter spec
tickets.rationale: Extraction story needs concrete boundary evidence.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Document AIOS sources, field mapping, out-of-scope fields, ownership boundary.

tickets.title: Add tool-call / policy-check / human-approval event types
tickets.rationale: README names these classes but code uses free-form strings.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Typed helpers/constants and vectors for each event class.

tickets.title: Add ADR-0003 TSA/RFC3161 anchoring implementation checkpoint
tickets.rationale: ADR exists but executable scope is missing.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Clarify M5 deliverable: mock provider, AnchorRecord, anchor vectors, trust roots.
tickets.tests_required: Docs lint; future mock TSA tests.

tickets.title: Add docs claim-safety cleanup
tickets.files_likely_touched: README.md; SDK metadata; SDK READMEs; GOVERNANCE.md
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Risk phrases downgraded and roadmap-only claims labeled.
tickets.cli_command_to_verify: rg -n "ready|compliant|certified|technical guarantee" README.md sdk docs GOVERNANCE.md

tickets.title: Add examples/quickstart project
tickets.rationale: Snippets are not runnable project evidence.

tickets.title: Add package publishing verification report
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Report includes artifacts, hashes, workflow IDs, TestPyPI/npm/provenance.

tickets.title: Add storage backend decision ADR
tickets.rationale: M6 durability needs an agreed path.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Compare file/SQLite/Postgres/S3 and define append-only/replay invariants.

tickets.title: Add auditor export JSON schema
tickets.rationale: Auditors need a stable non-SDK contract.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Schema covers events, verification result, mapping, optional anchors, disclaimers.

recommendation.testpypi_npm_alpha: continue allowed with narrow alpha wording
recommendation.beta_ga: No-Go until verifier CLI, proof bundle, mappings, adapter story, and anchoring implementation exist
